document_summary: Introduction page of the International Journal of Consumer Studies (IJCS), describing its scope as an international forum for academic and research papers on consumer security and well-being, covering consumer sciences, consumer policy, and consumer education. Indexed by Scopus.

snippets.subject: Journal title
snippets.reasoning: Identifies the journal where Liu's article was published.

snippets.text: The International Journal of Consumer Studies provides an international forum for academic and research papers with a focus on how consumers can enhance their security and well being. It publishes articles of interest to an international audience and at the leading edge of consumer research throughout the world. The scope of the Journal includes: - Consumer sciences and their application - Consumer policy - Consumer education
snippets.subject: Journal description and scope
snippets.reasoning: Describes IJCS as an international forum at the leading edge of consumer research, establishing journal credibility.
